title: Cucusonic / «The Sound of Paradise»
note_es: Single con Matthew Dear. Proyecto In Place of War + The Vinyl Factory, con murciélagos y ranas de Colombia. La puerta de entrada a Brian Eno y a EarthPercent.
note_en: Single with Matthew Dear. Project by In Place of War and The Vinyl Factory, featuring bats and frogs from Colombia. The entry point to Brian Eno and EarthPercent.
